description: Use this API to return model name of the CCT Miscellaneous other model. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.9.0. ierr, model = cctmdlnam_msco(mins)

parameters.name: mins
parameters.description: Model instance number of the model. (input).

error_codes.description: No error; MODEL name is returned.
No model attached for the specified MINS.
Dynamics data not present in working memory.
